capabilities.summary: Return bounded firmographic context and fit signals for selected accounts; raw records, full exports, underlying notes, and debug payloads are not supported.
capabilities.title: account_enrichment_summary

capabilities.summary: Rank at-risk accounts with explicit evidence for why they need attention.
capabilities.title: account_risk_summary

capabilities.summary: Rank at-risk accounts and return bounded enrichment context for the selected accounts.
capabilities.title: at_risk_account_enrichment_summary

capabilities.summary: Compose gtm.account_risk_summary -> gtm.prepare_followup_tasks when the requested business action needs derived targets before governed preparation.
capabilities.title: Gtm.At Risk Followup Preparation

capabilities.summary: Compose gtm.account_risk_summary -> gtm.prepare_reassignment_plan when the requested business action needs derived targets before governed preparation.
capabilities.title: Gtm.At Risk Reassignment Preparation

inputs.summary: Specific account selected from the bottleneck review

capabilities.summary: Draft outreach only for a specific account already selected from a bounded bottleneck or at-risk account review. Do not use this capability to choose the top or affected account from analysis; use the approval-gated follow-up preparation flow for derived-target bottleneck or at-risk requests.
capabilities.title: bottleneck_account_outreach_draft

capabilities.summary: Draft a bounded outreach message for a selected target and explicit objective; send actions and raw transcripts are not supported.
capabilities.title: draft_outreach_message

capabilities.summary: Return bounded lookalike accounts using explainable similarity logic; raw payloads and underlying model data are not supported.
capabilities.title: lookalike_accounts

inputs.summary: Named objection theme. Use competitor for competitor objections.

capabilities.summary: Return bounded objection-response variants for a selected competitor or concern.
capabilities.title: objection_response_variants

capabilities.summary: Return a bounded forecast summary for open pipeline with likely, best-case, and risk-adjusted views.
capabilities.title: pipeline_forecast_summary

capabilities.summary: Return a bounded pipeline health summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capabilities.title: pipeline_summary

capabilities.summary: Prepare follow-up tasks for high-risk accounts without executing downstream mutations.
capabilities.title: prepare_followup_tasks

capabilities.summary: Prepare a reassignment preview for overloaded pipeline coverage without executing downstream mutations.
capabilities.title: prepare_reassignment_plan

inputs.summary: Account cohort; map phrases like expansion candidates to expansion_candidates_q2 and at risk q2 to at_risk_q2

capabilities.summary: Rank bounded accounts or enriched cohorts by explainable GTM priority.
capabilities.title: prioritize_accounts

inputs.summary: Account cohort to prioritize, such as expansion_candidates_q2
Maximum accounts to consider before drafting

capabilities.summary: Prioritize a bounded account cohort, include bounded enrichment context for the top accounts, and draft one outreach message for the highest-priority account; this is for prioritization-to-enrichment-to-draft requests, not lead routing.
capabilities.title: prioritized_outreach_draft

inputs.summary: Account cohort; map phrases like expansion candidates to expansion_candidates_q2 and at risk q2 to at_risk_q2

capabilities.summary: Compose gtm.prioritize_accounts -> gtm.route_leads when the requested business action needs derived targets before governed preparation.
capabilities.title: Gtm.Prioritized Routing Preparation

capabilities.summary: Return a bounded product pipeline summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capabilities.title: product_pipeline_summary

inputs.summary: Lead cohort; map phrases like inbound leads or last week inbound leads to inbound_last_week
Destination queue or team; defaults to sales when the user asks for routing recommendations without naming a queue

capabilities.summary: Prepare an approval-gated routing preview for scored or hot leads in a named cohort; outreach drafting is not supported by this capability.
capabilities.title: route_leads

capabilities.summary: Return a bounded sales team performance summary for a quarter and optional scope.
capabilities.title: sales_team_performance_summary

inputs.summary: Cohort reference; map phrases like inbound leads or last week inbound leads to inbound_last_week

capabilities.summary: Return bounded lead scores and explainable priority bands for a named cohort.
capabilities.title: score_leads

capabilities.summary: Return a bounded stage bottleneck summary for open pipeline by an allowed slice.
capabilities.title: stage_bottleneck_summary

capabilities.summary: Return stalled open opportunities with bounded evidence and explainable stall reasoning.
capabilities.title: stalled_opportunity_review

capabilities.summary: Return bounded follow-up content variants for an explicit GTM target.
capabilities.title: suggest_followup_content
